product_overview: Sequndang Landing Page is a public marketing site for Sequndang POS that explains the product value, showcases key features, and guides prospective customers toward a free trial registration. It also provides contact and FAQ content to help users evaluate the service before submitting their details.
core_goals: Learn what Sequndang POS offers and whether it fits their store
Review product features, pricing, and common questions before deciding
Navigate quickly to relevant sections on the single-page landing page
Register for a free trial by submitting store and contact details
Reach support through email or WhatsApp contact links

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Sticky top navigation that lets users jump to major sections and open a mobile menu on smaller screens.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> Observe the navigation bar remain visible and change style -> Click a section link -> See the page smoothly scroll to that section
Navigate to / -> Click the trial CTA in the navigation bar -> See the page scroll to the trial registration section
Navigate to / -> Open the mobile menu -> View the available navigation links -> Close the mobile menu

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Opening section that introduces the product and directs users toward features or trial registration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Read the headline and subheadline -> Click the primary CTA -> See the page scroll to the trial registration section
Navigate to / -> Read the headline and subheadline -> Click the secondary CTA -> See the page scroll to the features section

features.name: Social Proof Section
features.description: Trust-building section that shows active usage statistics and other credibility indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the social proof section -> View the displayed statistics and trust indicators

features.name: Features Section
features.description: Feature grid that presents the main POS capabilities users can evaluate.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the features section -> View the feature cards and read the capability summaries

features.name: How It Works Section
features.description: Simple walkthrough that explains the trial, setup, and day-to-day usage flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the how-it-works section -> View the numbered steps that explain the onboarding process

features.name: Pricing Section
features.description: Pricing cards that let users compare available plans and choose a path toward trial registration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the pricing section -> Compare the plan cards and view the highlighted popular plan badge
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the pricing section -> Click the trial CTA on a plan card -> See the page scroll to the trial registration section

features.name: FAQ Section
features.description: Accordion-based FAQ area where users can open questions to read answers before registering.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the FAQ section -> Expand a question -> Read the answer -> Collapse the question
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the FAQ section -> Expand another question -> Read the answer

features.name: Trial Registration Form
features.description: Multi-field self-serve trial form that collects store, owner, contact, and business details for follow-up.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the trial registration section -> Fill in the required store and contact fields -> Select the business details and optional preferences -> Submit the form -> See a success confirmation with a checkmark
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the trial registration section -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit the form -> See validation messages for the missing fields
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the trial registration section -> Enter an invalid email format -> Submit the form -> See the email validation error
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the trial registration section -> Enter a message longer than allowed -> Submit the form -> See the length validation error

features.name: Contact Section
features.description: Contact area that provides email and WhatsApp links for direct outreach.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the contact section -> Click the email link -> Open the mail client
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the contact section -> Click the WhatsApp link -> Open WhatsApp

features.name: Footer
features.description: Closing page area that offers additional navigation, social links, and copyright information.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the footer -> Click a footer navigation link -> See the page move to the linked section
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the footer -> Click a social media link -> Open the corresponding social profile
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the footer -> View the copyright notice and year

routes.description: Single-page landing page with all sections rendered inline

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Sticky navbar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links and mobile hamburger menu
user_interactions: Observe navbar changes style after scrolling past 60px
Click nav links (Fitur, Harga, FAQ, Kontak) to smooth-scroll to sections
Click CTA button "Coba Gratis" to scroll to
Click hamburger icon on mobile to open/close mobile menu

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Landing hero with headline, subheadline, and two CTA buttons
user_interactions: Click "Mulai Gratis 14 Hari" button to navigate to
Click "Lihat Fitur" button to navigate to

features.name: Social Proof Section
features.description: Shows trust indicators such as stats or logos

features.name: Features Section
features.description: Grid of feature cards highlighting POS capabilities

features.name: How It Works Section
features.description: Step-by-step guide on how to use the POS system

features.name: Pricing Section
features.description: Four pricing plan cards (Trial, Basic, Pro, Enterprise) with features list and CTA per plan
user_interactions: View 4 plan cards with pricing details
Click "Mulai Gratis" (Trial plan) button navigating to
Click "Pilih Paket Ini" (Basic/Pro/Enterprise) buttons navigating to
Identify "Paling Populer" badge on Pro plan

features.name: FAQ Section
features.description: Accordion-style frequently asked questions

features.name: Trial Registration Form
features.description: Multi-field form allowing users to register for a free trial. Submits to the dashboard API via POST.
user_interactions: Fill in Email (required, valid email format)
Fill in Alamat Lengkap (optional, max 300 chars)
Fill in Dari mana tahu Sequndang (optional)
Fill in Pesan/Catatan Tambahan (optional, max 500 chars)
Click "Kirim Pendaftaran" button to submit form
See validation error messages on required fields when left empty
See success state with checkmark after successful submission

features.name: Contact Section
features.description: Contact information section with email and WhatsApp links
user_interactions: Click email link to open mail client
Click WhatsApp link to open WhatsApp

features.name: Footer
features.description: Footer with brand info, nav links (Produk, Bantuan, Legal), social links, and copyright

known_limitations.issue: Trial registration form sends POST to external dashboard API at localhost:3001. Tests may fail if dashboard server is not running.
known_limitations.impact: Form submission will return network error without the dashboard server running

known_limitations.issue: All navigation uses anchor hash links (#fitur,
known_limitations.impact: All sections are on single page; navigation testing requires scroll/hash verification
